description: Use this file to answer high-level questions about Jeremiah's professional background, work history, technical strengths, and style as a software engineer. Keep answers factual and concise, and avoid inventing employers, dates, responsibilities, or technologies that are not included here.

sections.heading: Professional summary
points: Jeremiah is a senior software engineer with professional experience building modern web applications.
His work has focused heavily on front-end engineering, design systems, and product-quality user interfaces.
He is especially strong in React, TypeScript, CSS, and component architecture.

sections.heading: Professional experience
points: Jeremiah has worked on customer-facing applications, reusable component systems, and tools that support large product ecosystems.
He has experience contributing to both product development and the systems that help teams ship consistent UI at scale.
His professional work includes building interfaces, shaping front-end architecture, and improving developer experience.

sections.heading: Technical skills
points: Jeremiah works primarily with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, CSS, HTML, and related web platform technologies.
He is comfortable designing component APIs, building maintainable front-end systems, and translating design intent into production code.
He also has experience with backend-adjacent integration work needed to support full product features.

sections.heading: Communication and work style signals
points: Jeremiah values craftsmanship, clarity, and thoughtful implementation.
He cares about making systems understandable and maintainable for other developers.
His work style reflects both technical depth and a strong eye for polish and usability.
